name: Anise Pizzelles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the pizzelle iron.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer set to low speed, beat all ingredients until well combined.
3. Spoon a heaping tablespoonful of mixture onto the center of the pizzelle iron, or use the amount recommended by the manufacturer.
4. Cover and bake for about 30 seconds.
5. Lift the cover carefully and loosen the pizzelle using a spatula.
6. Place the pizzelle on a wire rack to cool.
7. Repeat with remaining batter.
Makes about 4-1/2 dozen (54 pizzelles, 28 per pound trimmed).
